channel.title: EMMA Recent Disclosures — Louisiana
channel.description: Recent continuing disclosures for Louisiana issuers

item.title: Ascension Parish Industrial Development Board — IDB Revenue Bonds Series 2026A (Project Aurora Steel)
item.description: Industrial Development Board Revenue Bonds — private activity bond for Aurora Steel Donaldsonville LLC. Notional $450M. IDB authorization filed 2026-04-12.

item.title: St. James Parish Industrial Development Board — IDB Revenue Bond (Project Crescent) continuing disclosure
item.description: Industrial revenue bond continuing disclosure. Issuer: St. James Parish IDB. Project finance for Crescent Industrial Holdings consortium, St. James Parish, LA.
